# viettelidc_ovpc_launch_template (Resource)

ViettelIDC Launch Template for Autoscale Groups. All attributes are immutable (RequiresReplace / ForceNew) — any change destroys the template and creates a new one.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cpu_size` (Number) Number of vCPUs. Immutable.
- `memory_size` (Number) Memory size in GB. Immutable.
- `name` (String) Launch Template name. Immutable.
- `vm_id` (String) Source VM ID used to seed the template. Immutable.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Optional description. Immutable.
- `vpc_id` (String) VPC ID. Falls back to the provider default vpc_id when unset.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Launch Template ID assigned by the system.
